title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Bhubaneswar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions:
Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions!
